SAMPLE AS AN EXAMPLE -- PLEASE CONSULT A LEGAL PROFESSIONAL.
[Date]
From: [Sender Name]
[Title] | [Company] | [Address] | [City] | [State] | [Zip]
To: [Recipient Name]
[Title] | [Company] | [Address] | [City] | [State] | [Zip]
Dear [Recipient Name]:
This letter is to affirm our interest to purchase [LIST OF WHAT YOU’RE OFFERING TO
PURCHASE HERE] owned by [NAME OF OWNER/OWNING COMPANY.]
We are prepared to offer [PURCHASE PRICE] as the purchase price according to the terms and
conditions attached to this letter. These terms and conditions are still open to negotiation.
If you are interested in selling according to those terms, please respond and I will make you a formal
purchase offer. Likewise, feel free to contact me if you’d like to discuss the terms further.
Sincerely,
[YOUR SIGNATURE]
[YOUR NAME]
[ATTACHMENT OF TERMS AND CONDITIONS HERE]
Offer Letter Sample
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
